title: P5-04 WCAG attestation signal module (fail-closed on a11y)
acceptance_criteria: Consume ctx.accessibilityScore + ctx.accessibilityScoreSource post-hoc (NO execution-order dependency, NO call into accessibility.ts)

FAIL-CLOSED: when accessibilityScore is undefined OR scoreSource === 'unavailable' OR score is 0 due to a caught failure, emit 'WCAG signal unavailable (accessibility scan did not produce a usable score)' — NEVER a 0/100 'ADA lawsuit risk' finding
When a genuine score exists: factual signal referencing the Lighthouse-subset limitation explicitly (not full WCAG 2.2 AA). Also detect accessibility-statement link via cheerio (presence only)
moduleId 'P5-04', category 'Accessibility Compliance'; no score number surfaced as a compliance verdict; regulation refs as context only
Pure function — NO new outbound request
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
